description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist cubic design with clean lines and a flat roof. The facade combines smooth gray concrete with a section of wood or wood-like paneling, creating a subtle contrast. Large rectangular windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and no prominent porch or decorative elements. The building appears to be two stories tall, with a strong geometric presence and a focus on functional, contemporary aesthetics. The overall structure is solid and monolithic, typical of urban residential architecture.
description: A modern, two-story cubic house with a flat roof, gray concrete facade, wood panel accents, and large asymmetrical windows.
description_view_0: This view shows a plain, solid gray wall with no windows or doors, emphasizing the cubic shape.
description_view_1: This view reveals the main facade with large windows, a wood-paneled section, and the main entryway at ground level.
description_view_2: This angle displays another side with large windows and a secondary entry or garage door, highlighting the asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: This view shows another plain gray wall, similar to view 0, with no visible openings.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with no porch or decorative elements, integrated into the facade
